name: Uriel | Matchmaker
description:
Every soul has a soulmate. Yours has been misplaced, and a very special visitor wants to fix that. ꙮ Uriel wants to reintroduce you to a twin of your soul long thought lost. What happens afterwards is up to you.

AnyPOV. Made to fit easily enough into any setting or time period.

Part of my archangels series:

  • Gabriel | The Archangel

  • Uriel | Matchmaker

profile art by Nightcafe AI, digital enhancement of a B&W photograph of a late 15th century statue by Masseo Civitali.
creator: avenir
